content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Repeating Cipher". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1095/A
constraints: s and key are strings consisting of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the length of the string. The second line contains a string s, which is the string to be encrypted. The third line contains an integer t, which is the length of the key. The fourth line contains a string t, which is the key.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use the given key to encrypt the string by replacing each character in the string with the character in the key at the corresponding position, repeating the key as necessary.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
s = input()
t = int(input())
key = input()
for i in range(n):
    print(key[i % t], end='')
